party.title: Happy Birthday, Little Riya!
party.address: 42 Blossom Lane, Central Park, New York, NY 10024
party.dressCode: Wear your pinkest outfit! Strawberry theme encouraged

hero.subtitle: Join us for the most magical strawberry-filled celebration ever! 🎉

facts.label: Lifetime Chocolates Eaten
facts.description: And she remembers the exact wrapper of every single one 😄

facts.label: Strawberries Devoured
facts.description: Her spirit animal is literally a strawberry 🍓

facts.label: Average Giggles Per Day
facts.description: Scientists are still trying to record them all 🔬

facts.label: Bedtime Stories Requested
facts.description: "One more story!" — Emma, every single night 🌙

facts.label: Living Room Dance Parties
facts.description: Zero invitations needed, maximum chaos guaranteed 🎵

facts.label: Stuffed Animal Friends
facts.description: All named, all loved, all attending tonight's party 🫶

treats.name: Strawberry Dream Cake
treats.description: Three-tiered masterpiece with fresh strawberry cream, edible flowers & Emma's name in gold letters!

treats.name: Strawberry Shortcake Bites
treats.description: Mini cloud-soft shortcakes piled high with fresh berries, whipped cream & a drizzle of strawberry glaze!

treats.name: Chocolate-Dipped Berries
treats.description: Plump fresh strawberries hand-dipped in rich Belgian chocolate with sprinkles & edible gold dust!

treats.name: Strawberry Soft Serve Station
treats.description: DIY ice cream bar with pink strawberry soft serve, sprinkles, candy floss & all the toppings imaginable!

treats.name: Mini Strawberry Cupcakes
treats.description: Bite-sized vanilla cupcakes topped with swirls of strawberry buttercream & a fresh berry crown!

treats.name: Sparkling Strawberry Lemonade
treats.description: Emma's signature drink — freshly squeezed lemonade with strawberry purée, mint & edible glitter bubbles!

quiz.question: What is the birthday girl's favorite treat?
Which color is the party theme?
What activity includes music and dancing?
Which of these is NOT in the treats section?

timeline.title: 🎉 Doors Open & Welcome!
timeline.description: Guests arrive to a strawberry-scented wonderland! Welcome drinks, photo booth & meet-and-greet with our birthday princess.

timeline.title: 🎨 Face Painting & Crafts
timeline.description: Our talented artists will transform little ones into strawberries, butterflies & magical creatures. Craft tables open!

timeline.title: 🎪 Games & Activities
timeline.description: Musical chairs, strawberry toss, treasure hunt & the giant bouncy castle! Prizes for every little champion 🏆

timeline.title: 🎂 Cake & Singing!
timeline.description: The grand cake ceremony! Emma makes her 5 birthday wishes, we sing together & dive into the most delicious strawberry cake.

timeline.title: 💃 Dance Party & Treats
timeline.description: DJ drops the beat, dessert table opens & Emma leads the dance floor! Goodie bags handed out to every guest 🎁

timeline.title: 🌟 Farewell & Hugs!
timeline.description: The sweetest goodbye — family photos, last hugs & goodie bags for everyone. Thank you for making Emma's day magical!

activities.name: Face Painting Studio
activities.description: Professional artists turn little faces into strawberries, unicorns, butterflies & superheroes! Each design takes 5–10 minutes of pure magic.

activities.name: Giant Bouncy Castle
activities.description: A massive strawberry-themed inflatable castle with slides, ball pit & obstacle course! Socks required, smiles guaranteed 😄

activities.name: Strawberry Photo Booth
activities.description: Strike a pose with giant strawberry hats, berry baskets & "I'm 5!" signs! Instant prints for every family to take home as keepsakes.

activities.name: Games & Prize Corner
activities.description: Musical chairs, strawberry toss, pass-the-parcel & a mystery treasure hunt around the garden! Every child wins a prize 🎁

features.text: Special goodie bags for every guest

parents.title: Meet the Parents! 👨‍👩‍👧
parents.subtitle: The amazing people behind the birthday girl

list.name: Ritika Kumari
list.description: Riya's loving mother, party planner extraordinaire & professional hugger 💕

list.name: Vivek Kumar
list.description: Riya's proud papa, storyteller & master of silly jokes that make everyone laugh 😄
list.hobbies: Building, sports & teaching Riya new skills

list.name: Sneha Kumari
list.description: Emma's big sis & best friend, fashion advisor & protector of all things cute 🌸
list.hobbies: Art, music & looking after her little sister
